items.title: OpenAI’s Luna name turned Terra’s dead token into a YOLO leverage trade
items.whyYouShouldCare: The transformation of Terra's token into a leverage trade highlights the volatility in crypto markets, which can impact investor sentiment towards Solana.

items.title: Solana whales bet $15mln against SOL – Bears can drive it down to $40 IF…
items.whyYouShouldCare: The $15 million bet against SOL by whales indicates a significant bearish sentiment, which could pressure Solana's price and affect liquidity.

items.title: FundBank becomes IRACE Digital in bid to bridge traditional finance and crypto
items.whyYouShouldCare: FundBank's rebranding to IRACE Digital signals a growing interest in integrating traditional finance with crypto, potentially enhancing Solana's ecosystem usage.
